g2n4.title: We Dance Again (feat. Nakhane Toure)
g2n4.transition: Let the percussive tail of We Dance Again ride out, then gently nudge the pitch up half a step and blend the kick patterns together as you bring in the next track, using a low-pass filter sweep to smooth the key shift from 7A into 8A over 16 bars

g2n5.title: Drive
g2n5.transition: Let the hypnotic bassline of Drive ride out for 16 bars, then gradually introduce the melodic vocal chops of We Dance Again with a slow filter sweep over 8 bars, matching the groove before the full drop at 120 BPM

g3n4.title: Cell Division
g3n4.transition: Blend the tail of Cell Division's driving kick pattern into Mamba's intro over 16 bars, using a high-pass filter sweep on Mamba to gradually open up the top end while nudging pitch +0.7% to lock the 140→141 BPM step; the shared E major energy between 8B and 7B creates a smooth tonal descent that lands Mamba's drop with maximum impact
